build_system: uv workspace; uv_build>=0.11.14,<0.12 (default); hatchling for workspace-io
content_formats: Markdown + YAML frontmatter (vault pages, CLAUDE.md layout block)

stack_departures.deepagents: rejected-by-design — replaced by in-house SubagentPool to avoid framework lock-in and to keep fan-out semantics under direct control (CLAUDE.md §2 note)
stack_departures.langgraph: rejected-by-design — not adopted; SubagentPool uses raw asyncio + langchain-core Runnables instead
stack_departures.langchain (top-level): rejected-by-design — only langchain-core + langchain-aws are installed
stack_departures.langchain-mcp-adapters: deferred — not needed until agents need to consume external MCP tools (CLAUDE.md §4 note)
stack_departures.langchain-anthropic: rejected-by-design — Bedrock-only constraint; direct Anthropic API would silently bypass Bedrock
